text:
Three quiet but mighty updates shipped today. 

First, Gemini Search is now half the price. We reset the base Vertex rates, so your agents can scour the web for less. Second, GitHub OAuth is back online—the prod credentials have returned from the void, so logging in actually works again. Finally, MCP documentation is officially wired into the main API reference, complete with working tests. 

Everything is just a little smoother today. Code and docs at pollinations.ai 🌿✨

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #github #machinelearning
